# Larsha Technologies

> Fast laptop & computer repair and professional website development in Bangalore, India.

## About

Larsha Technologies is an IT services business based in Bangalore, Karnataka, India.
Founded by Hemanth K, we offer doorstep laptop and computer repair, virus removal,
OS installation, SSD/RAM upgrades, data recovery, and professional website development
for small businesses.

## Services

- Laptop & computer hardware repair (screen, keyboard, battery, motherboard)
- Virus & malware removal
- OS installation (Windows, macOS)
- SSD upgrade & RAM upgrade
- Data recovery
- Slow computer optimisation
- Website design & development
- Website maintenance

## Service Areas

Hennur, Koramangala, Indiranagar, Domlur, Kalyan Nagar, Kammanahalli — Bangalore, Karnataka, India
